title: Correlations of the phase gradients of the light wave propagating in a turbulent medium in the regime of weak scintillations
author_string: V. A. Bogachev, I. V. Kolokolov, V. V. Lebedev, A. V. Nemtseva, F. A. Starikov
abstract: We investigate numerically correlation functions of the phase of light waves that propagate through turbulent media. Special attention is paid to the off-diagonal component of the correlation function of the phase gradients which is insensitive to the outer scale of turbulence. The results of our simulations are in a good agreement with the analytical expressions obtained in Ref. \cite{KLS25}. Thus, we numerically confirm expectations based on uniformity of the perturbation theory for the logarithm of the envelope.
